name: Cala Pregonda
description: One of the north coast's most iconic coves: reddish sand, islets just offshore and an almost lunar feel. It has no facilities, and that is precisely its charm.

practicalInfo.acceso: On foot, about 30 min from the Binimel·là car park
practicalInfo.aparcamiento: Free car park at Binimel·là (then ~30 min on foot); very limited in summer
practicalInfo.servicios: None: bring water, food and shade
practicalInfo.mejorEpoca: May–June and September; in August, go early
